text.overview: This role is part of our Agile/Scrum SaaS Solutions Engineering team and contributes primarily by providing support to our AWS cloud-based central authentication platform used around the world to effortlessly and securely connect guests and residents (and all their devices) to the internet with an at-home Wi-Fi experience. Our platform serves a variety of markets. From hotels and multi-family residences to campgrounds and college campuses, every day, tens of millions of people benefit from the services we provide.
essentialFunctions: Works in a variety of languages and frameworks including .NET, C# and SQL, JavaScript, Node, Linux, Python and Elasticsearch.
With a focus on the backend, engineers for the full stack of very busy web applications with SPAs and HTTP APIs and high-velocity data processing and feature-rich administrative experiences.
Performs hands-on extraction of DB resident logic (SQL code, stored procedures, etc.) into separate service-oriented storage.
Collaborates with other development, product management and UX team members to turn user stories into performant, scalable capabilities, features, services, and applications within the ecosystem.
Partners with team members across functions to solve architectural and code-design challenges.
Identifies and incorporates security requirements in the software development lifecycle process.
Other duties as assigned.
requirements: 5+ years of experience of development in C# with substantial experience in data management systems and storage design.
3+ years SQL Server database development, writing SQL code, stored procedures.
Substantial data-mapping experience with Entity Framework, DynamoDB SDK, and object and blob storage in general.
Experience with using RESTful APIs, and designing and implementing them.
Experience in complex AWS systems with an emphasis on serverless (no reserved capacity and minimal operational overhead).
Proven experience shipping product as part of a small-team environment.
preferred: Experience developing with analytics, reporting and data visualization technologies.
Experience with data stream processing and message queues.
Familiarity with front-end web technology, SPA, static delivery and infrastructure (CDN, caching, etc.).

text.overview: In this Software Engineer-Authentication role you will build and maintain AWS serverless integrations that connect our captive portal WiFi platform with hotel Property Management Systems (PMS) and loyalty programs worldwide. Using primarily C#/.NET and AWS Serverless, you'll develop integrations that enable hotel guests to authenticate via room number lookups, post charges to guest folios, and enroll in loyalty programs, all through our captive portal.
essentialFunctions: Develops, tests, and maintains AWS Serverless applications (C# / .NET) that connect our platform with third-party PMS and loyalty APIs.
Implements SQS-triggered message processing pipelines that handle guest inquiry, room charge, configuration, and loyalty enrollment work units.
Integrates with third-party REST, SOAP, including OAuth2/Cognito authentication flows, token caching, and credential management via AWS SSM Parameter Store.
Builds and maintains DynamoDB data models for device configuration, session caching, and authentication token storage.
Leverages AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, agentic coding assistants) to accelerate development, improve code quality, and automate repetitive tasks.
Troubleshoots production issues across distributed serverless architectures.
Identifies and incorporates security requirements in the software development lifecycle, including PII handling, data obfuscation, and secure credential storage.
requirements: 3+ years of professional software engineering experience.
Experience reading and writing SQL.
Proficiency in C# and .NET (experience with .NET 8 or recent versions preferred).
Experience building and deploying AWS Lambda functions or similar serverless architectures.
Working knowledge of AWS services: SQS, DynamoDB, API Gateway, SSM Parameter Store, Step Functions, CloudWatch.
Experience consuming and integrating with RESTful APIs, including OAuth2 authentication flows.
Comfort using AI coding assistants (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude) as part of daily development workflow.
preferred: Familiarity with hospitality industry protocols (FIAS, OHIP, PMS concepts like folios, reservations, NoPost flags).
Advanced knowledge of SQL, stored procedures, database performance tuning, MSSQL.
Experience building or consuming MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to extend AI tooling with custom data sources and APIs.

text.overview: This role is part of our Agile/Scrum SaaS Solutions Engineering team and contributes by building and scaling the AWS-based authentication platform that powers secure, seamless connectivity for millions of guests and residents around the world. From hotels and multi-family properties to universities and campgrounds, our platform delivers an “at-home” Wi-Fi experience across diverse environments and devices. You'll be part of a small, high-impact engineering team designing and supporting distributed systems, APIs, and data pipelines that operate on a global scale.
essentialFunctions: Designs, builds, and supports distributed, event-driven systems running on AWS using (and not limited to) Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, EC2, and OpenSearch.
Develops primarily in C#/.NET and Python, delivering APIs, backend services, and high-velocity data processing components. PHP experience is a plus.
Leads efforts to re-architect and refactor legacy applications into modular, cloud-native microservices following AWS and industry best practices.
Collaborates with Product, QA, and other engineers to turn user stories into scalable, secure, and observable production features.
Owns end-to-end performance, scalability, and reliability of services, from design through deployment and monitoring.
Integrates security-first development practices (IAM least privilege, encryption, secrets management, secure API design).
Participates in design reviews, code reviews, and post-incident analysis to improve reliability and maintainability.
Continuously evolves engineering standards, CI/CD pipelines, and testing practices in a fast-moving Agile environment.
requirements: 5+ years professional experience developing in C#/.NET and/or Python, with emphasis on backend systems and data processing.
Strong AWS expertise, particularly in serverless and managed-service architectures (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, EventBridge, OpenSearch).
Demonstrated experience designing and operating RESTful APIs and backend services at scale.
Solid understanding of data modeling across SQL and NoSQL systems (SQL Server, DynamoDB, OpenSearch, S3).
Advanced experience with OpenSearch/Elasticsearch strongly preferred, including index design, aggregation, and query optimization.
Familiarity with stream processing and messaging systems (SQS, SNS, Kinesis, Kafka).
Proven ability to ship, maintain, and support production services as part of a small, high-performing team.
preferred: Experience with analytics, reporting, and data visualization frameworks.
Knowledge of secure development, incident response, and compliance (SOC2, GDPR, privacy standards).

Recruits, onboards and provides ongoing career support to individual engineers and the teams at large.
Assesses opportunities for application and process improvement and prepares documentation of rationale to share with team members and leadership.
Analyzes and resolves technical and process problems.
Communicates within and between teams to break down barriers, align on outcomes, and improve cooperation.
Works with software developers, product managers, and software architects to plan, design, develop, test, and maintain product offerings.
Works with Product Management and Engineering leadership to prioritize sprints that balance roadmap features, tech debt, and bugs.
Guides the Engineering team's development efforts towards successful project delivery.
Prepares reports and other documentation on the status, operation and maintenance of software.
Determines operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, solution development, and proposed solutions.
Guides the Engineering team's development to ensure procedures for secure software development practices and deployment processes are followed.
Leads security reviews as needed to facilitate technical discovery.
Other duties as assigned.
requirements: Experience shipping commercial software product in a small-team environment.
5+ years of experience leading, mentoring, and developing direct-reports.
3+ years of experience leading developers using, designing, and implementing user experiences utilizing: C#, HTTP APIs for multi-tenant Software-as-a-Service, SQL Server databases.
Experience in complex AWS systems with an emphasis on serverless solutions.
Experience designing, testing, documenting, and debugging distributed systems.
preferred: Experience serving as technical lead throughout the full software development lifecycle, from conception, architecture definition, detailed design, scoping, planning, implementation, testing to documentation, delivery and maintenance.
text.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience.

jdText.overview: This role is part of our leadership of our Agile/Scrum SaaS Solutions Engineering team and contributes primarily by providing support to our quality assurance, testing, and observability efforts. Our platform is used around the world to effortlessly and securely connect guests and residents (and all their devices) to the internet with an at-home Wi-Fi experience. Our platform serves a variety of markets, from hotels and multi-family residences to campgrounds and college campuses. Every day, tens of millions of people benefit from the services we provide.

roles.title: Sr. Engineering Manager
roles.scope: Manages multiple teams; owns cross-team programs, dependencies, and resource allocation. May require project management.
roles.complexity: Resolves organizational friction and delivery conflicts; leads complex multi-team initiatives with competing priorities
roles.autonomy: Significant autonomy over resourcing and delivery strategy; partners with Directors and PMs on roadmap planning
roles.influence: Strong org-level influence; partners with Directors and VPs on roadmap, headcount, and technical strategy

text.overview: The Senior Engineering Manager plays a critical leadership role within our Agile/Scrum SaaS Solutions Engineering organization, driving technical excellence, delivery quality, and team development across multiple product domains. This role provides oversight and strategic direction for software engineering teams responsible for building and maintaining our global connectivity platform, a system that enables guests, residents, and their devices to connect seamlessly and securely to the internet, creating an at-home Wi-Fi experience across hotels, multi-family properties, campuses, and other large-scale environments. As a senior leader, this role partners closely with the CTO and cross-functional stakeholders to shape the technical roadmap, mature our engineering culture, and ensure consistent, high-quality delivery at scale.
essentialFunctions: Leads, coaches, and develops multiple engineering teams and their managers, fostering a culture of accountability, innovation, and continuous improvement.
Serves as a mentor and trusted advisor, supporting career growth and providing technical and leadership guidance.
Partners with the CTO to define long-term organizational structure, resource plans, and engineering capacity.
Attracts and retains top talent, ensuring diversity, engagement, and performance across teams.
Translates business objectives into clear engineering strategies and execution plans.
Champions Agile best practices, optimizing team velocity, communication, and delivery efficiency.
Evaluates, implements, and scales engineering processes and tooling to support growth and quality across the software lifecycle.
Partners with Product Management to ensure that roadmap priorities balance innovation, technical debt, and platform stability.
Provides high-level technical oversight across multiple projects, ensuring architectural alignment and delivery of scalable, secure, high-performance solutions.
Collaborates with architects and technical leads to guide system design and major technical decisions.
Ensures strong alignment between product vision, system architecture, and implementation.
Oversees delivery of engineering initiatives, monitoring metrics for velocity, quality, and reliability.
Owns risk management for technical delivery, including dependencies, resourcing, and operational readiness.
Promotes secure coding practices, code reviews, and continuous integration/deployment (CI/CD) standards.
Acts as a bridge between engineering, product, and business functions to ensure alignment on priorities and outcomes.
Communicates complex technical concepts clearly to non-technical audiences, fostering understanding and confidence in engineering direction.
Represents the engineering organization in executive discussions, providing insight into progress, challenges, and opportunities.
Contributes to company-wide initiatives such as technical strategy, culture-building, or leadership development.
requirements: 8+ years of progressive experience in software engineering, including 5+ years leading teams and 2+ years managing managers.
Proven success delivering commercial SaaS products at scale, with a focus on quality, performance, and security.
Deep understanding of Agile delivery, CI/CD pipelines, and modern cloud-native architectures (AWS preferred).
Hands-on experience with distributed systems, APIs, and large-scale data or networking systems.
Ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously while maintaining strategic oversight.
Demonstrated ability to lead through influence, build alignment across functions, and communicate technical strategy to senior leadership.
preferred: Experience with C#, .NET, and SQL Server in a multi-tenant SaaS environment.
text.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (Master's preferred).

roles.title: Senior AI Engineer
roles.scope: Leads AI productivity initiatives across the entire engineering organization while also contributing hands on as a senior engineer on the core platform. Owns the design, build, and rollout of AI powered workflows, tools, and training programs company wide.
roles.complexity: Operates at the intersection of applied AI and cloud native architecture. Evaluates and introduces emerging AI patterns (agentic AI, LLM orchestration, multi step reasoning) while architecting scalable, secure, event driven systems on AWS.
roles.autonomy: Works with significant independence, setting AI governance and security guardrails for the organization and driving technical strategy across multiple engineering teams. Reports to a Senior Engineering Manager with no direct reports.
roles.influence: Serves as the organization's subject matter expert on AI tooling, partners with departments outside engineering on AI adoption, mentors engineers at all levels, and manages AI related vendor relationships.
roles.next: Distinguished Engineer or Director of Engineering

text.overview: This role is a dual-focus technical leadership position within our Engineering organization: leading company-wide AI productivity initiatives and contributing as a senior software engineer to our core product. You will design, build, and maintain AI-powered workflows and tools that accelerate delivery and raise quality across engineering and other departments. You will develop and execute training strategies that bring all employees along in adopting AI effectively and securely.
essentialFunctions: Designs, builds, and maintains AI-powered workflows, tools, and automation that improve productivity, code quality, and operational efficiency across engineering and other departments.
Evaluates, prototypes, and introduces cutting-edge AI technologies, frameworks, and patterns (including agentic AI, LLM orchestration, and multi-step reasoning) into company workflows.
Develops and executes AI training strategies and enablement programs for employees across the organization.
Establishes and maintains security guardrails, governance policies, and best practices for AI usage company-wide.
Manages AI-related vendor and tech partner relationships, evaluating tools and platforms for fit, security, and cost-effectiveness.
Architects, designs, and implements scalable, secure cloud-native solutions on AWS that handle high transaction volumes across multi-tenant environments.
Works closely with the lead architect and other principal and senior engineers to lead technical strategy and provide architectural guidance.
Drives end-to-end solution ownership, from requirements and architecture through implementation, deployment, and operational excellence.
Mentors and develops engineers at all levels, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous learning.
Designs and maintains event-driven, serverless architectures using AWS services (Lambda, DynamoDB, EventBridge, API Gateway, Step Functions, etc.).
requirements: 8+ years of professional software engineering experience.
3+ years with demonstrated leadership in AI adoption and tooling.
Proven hands-on experience building AI-powered workflows, developer tools, or automation systems that delivered measurable productivity gains.
Deep understanding of the current AI/ML landscape, foundation models, agentic AI patterns, LLM orchestration, and multi-step reasoning.
Strong security awareness in the context of AI, understanding risks around data leakage, prompt injection, and model misuse.
Deep expertise in AWS cloud services with hands-on experience designing and operating complex serverless and event-driven architectures.
Experience with both relational and NoSQL databases, such as MS SQL Server, DynamoDB, and OpenSearch.
Track record of end-to-end ownership of large-scale solutions.
preferred: Experience with data lake architectures and BI tooling (e.g., AWS Athena, QuickSight, Redshift, Glue).
Hands-on experience implementing CI/CD pipelines and designing deployment infrastructure using IaC frameworks.
AWS certification(s) (Solutions Architect, Developer, Security Specialty, or Machine Learning Specialty).

roles.title: Distinguished Engineer
roles.scope: Defines org-wide engineering standards and leads company-wide technical initiatives. IC equivalent of Director. May require project management.
roles.complexity: Architects solutions to the most complex, ambiguous problems with long-term, company-wide implications.
roles.autonomy: Fully autonomous; self-identifies the highest-leverage technical opportunities and drives resolution across org boundaries without direction
roles.influence: Definitive technical authority; shapes hiring standards and engineering culture; trusted by CTO on all major decisions.
roles.next: Sr. Distinguished Engineer or Director of Engineering (management track)

roles.title: Sr. Distinguished Engineer
roles.scope: Defines long-range architectural vision and multi-generational platform strategy; consulted on all major technical decisions. May require project management.
roles.complexity: Advises CTO on technical risk, investment, and emerging technology; navigates long-horizon platform strategy.
roles.autonomy: VP-equivalent autonomy; self-directs the most strategic IC work and represents engineering externally.
roles.influence: Industry-facing thought leader; consulted by board on technical strategy; shapes external technical reputation.
roles.next: Engineering Fellow or VP of Engineering track

roles.title: Director of Engineering
roles.scope: Owns an engineering department; accountable for org health, team OKRs, hiring plan, and delivery quality
roles.complexity: Drives org-wide process improvement; navigates business-engineering alignment and multi-team technical strategy
roles.autonomy: High autonomy; sets direction for managers and teams; proactively surfaces risks and opportunities to VP
roles.influence: Shapes engineering culture, headcount strategy, and vendor relationships; primary engineering partner to Product

roles.title: Sr. Director of Engineering
roles.scope: Oversees multiple engineering departments; owns cross-functional execution, headcount planning, and org-wide delivery accountability
roles.complexity: Navigates org-level tradeoffs and business-engineering alignment across multiple departments and stakeholders
roles.autonomy: Operates at VP level; represents engineering to exec team; makes decisions on hiring, structure, and investment
roles.influence: Org-wide influence; shapes hiring bar, culture, and technical strategy; key partner to Product and GTM leadership

roles.title: VP of Engineering
roles.scope: Owns the entire engineering organization; accountable to the CEO and board for delivery, culture, and technical vision
roles.complexity: Sets the technical and organizational vision; manages risk, prioritization, and investment at scale across the full eng org
roles.autonomy: Full autonomy; defines engineering priorities in alignment with CEO/CTO and company strategy
roles.influence: Company-wide authority; board-facing on technical matters; shapes the external technical brand and recruits top talent

text.overview: Our VP of Engineering will lead the execution of operations and people strategy across the engineering function. Reporting to the Chief Technology Officer (CTO) and serving as a critical member of the leadership team, this role will create, support, grow and develop high-performing teams with an engineering ethos that focuses on technical innovation, continuous improvement, and team collaboration. This role partners closely with the Product team to ensure we integrate planning and delivery processes to keep delivering the right outcomes for our customers. As a performance coach for the engineering teams, this role will establish performance plans aligned to company-level OKRs, develop professional growth plans, encourage self-reflection, and create nimble systems and processes (where needed) that drive high performance.
essentialFunctions: Identifies, recommends, and implements new technologies and systems to improve organizational processes and decision-making.
Communicates and implements, and where needed, updates, replaces, or creates, policies, procedures, and best practices to ensure effective and consistent Engineering operations.
Establishes and administers the Engineering budget.
Negotiates cost-effective contracts for the organization; coordinates and implements contractors work, and resolves any disputes over labor, scheduling, or payments.

Gives Eleven engineers the processes, management, mentorship, and tools to deliver the best products (such as a comprehensive knowledge base, uncomplicated org structure, learning opportunities, simple processes, and technical standards).
Works with the CTO to set goals and KPIs for the engineering team overall, and collaborates with engineering managers to set and track goals for their individual teams.
Assists with recruiting and hiring top engineering talent and building the Eleven engineering brand.
Works heavily with the product team to set expectations, allocate resources and prioritize, and follow through on commitments.
Works closely with customer success and product leadership to understand and resolve customer concerns with the company's SaaS products.
Mentors, develops, and empowers the engineering team through task assignments, 1-1s, weekly meetings, and support discussions.
Represents and communicates team capabilities and engineering priorities to the Leadership Team and across the organization.
Contributes to the codebase, architects and designs new systems, and participates in code reviews.
Ensures team success by removing roadblocks, addressing conflicts, and instilling software engineering best practices.
Tracks, produces, analyzes, and acts upon key metrics and milestones to ensure quality products are delivered on time.
Communicates and collaborates with clients, partners, and vendors on technical details.
Performs other duties as assigned.
requirements: 5+ years managing engineering teams, preferably teams of 20+ engineers.
10+ years software engineering experience developing web and API applications, with a preference for B2B SaaS.
2+ years experience managing contractors.
Experience with our tech stack (Vue, React, C#, Python, Node.js, AWS, SQL, MySQL, ElasticSearch, and DynamoDB).
Experience working with RESTful architecture and REST APIs.
Experience with organizing agile software teams to deliver high-quality features.
Strong verbal and written communication and documentation skills.
Ability to effectively lead and manage high-performing engineering teams, with a proven track record of success working with Product and Leadership teams to push development forward.
Excellent manager of managers with the ability to mentor and grow senior engineers and engineering managers.
10+ years of combined engineering experience, ideally starting as an individual contributor, then transitioning to senior management roles.
Experience scaling engineering teams and infrastructure at a fast pace.
preferred: Experience scaling a team.

roles.title: Chief Technology Officer
roles.scope: Owns the entire technology function, including engineering, architecture, and infrastructure; accountable to the CEO and board for the product's technical direction and reliability.
roles.complexity: Sets multi-year technology strategy and navigates the most complex technical and organizational tradeoffs across the entire engineering organization.
roles.autonomy: Full executive autonomy over technology strategy; partners directly with the CEO, President, and board on company direction.
roles.influence: Company-wide and external authority on technology; represents Eleven to investors, partners, and industry; shapes the technical brand and overall company strategy.

text.overview: The Chief Technology Officer (CTO) at Eleven is responsible for leading the company's technical strategy and direction, and overseeing the development and maintenance of the software product.
essentialFunctions: Sets the technical vision and strategy for the company and ensures that it aligns with the overall business goals.
Manages and leads the Engineering team, including assigning tasks, setting priorities, and providing guidance and mentorship.
Oversees the design, development, and deployment of the software product, ensuring that it meets the needs of customers and the company.
Manages the technology budget and makes decisions about resource allocation.
Keeps up to date with new technologies and trends and identifies opportunities to incorporate them into the product or the company's operations.
Collaborates with other departments, such as product management and sales, to ensure the product meets the needs of the market and the company's customers.
Acts as the main technical point of contact with external partners, such as vendors and investors.
Manages the technical infrastructure, including servers, databases, and other systems.
Builds and maintains a strong, talented, and efficient technology team that can support the company's growth.
Helps identify and mitigate technical risks that could impede the company's growth.
Helps define and maintain the company's technical standards, ensuring the technology used is scalable, reliable, and consistent.
Provides technical expertise to clients during the sales process, working closely with the sales team to create custom solutions.
Collaborates with the CEO and President to develop presentations and materials that showcase the company's technical capabilities to investors.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.scope: Manages CI/CD pipelines, deployments, and infrastructure provisioning tasks; supports reliability of core services
roles.complexity: Handles routine infrastructure issues and incidents; follows runbooks and escalates novel failures appropriately
roles.autonomy: Works with close guidance; escalates novel issues and infrastructure changes above a defined risk threshold
roles.influence: Contributes within the DevOps team; collaborates with developers on deployment readiness and environment stability

text.overview: This role brings both AWS and programming knowledge to a team of .NET developers and collaborates with senior stakeholders to understand business goals and ensure that development processes and technologies are aligned with these. The work performed by this role will streamline the delivery of our cloud-based central authentication platform around the world to effortlessly and securely connect guests and residents (and all their devices) to the internet with an at-home-like Wi-Fi experience. Our platform serves a variety of markets from hotels and multi-family residences and more, and every day, tens of millions of people benefit from the services we provide.
essentialFunctions: Deploys, maintains, upgrades, monitors, and patches AWS cloud infrastructure that support business and engineering needs.
Leverages infrastructure as code (Terraform/CloudFormation) to streamline features and functionality out to internal and external facing environments.
Limited application development in Python, Node, or TypeScript (troubleshoot a ticket, a few times a month).
Builds and maintains Docker images and helps Software Engineers orchestrate containers.
Builds continuous integration and continuous delivery pipelines and provides frameworks and best practices around CI/CD to development teams.
Automates and administers data backup and disaster recovery procedures.
Continually monitors industry best practices and applies learnings and continuous improvement to evolve our software development life cycle.
Collaborates with the existing DevOps and development team members to embrace infrastructure as code and augment a robust and scalable system.
Guides and performs security activities such as risk assessments, application vulnerability testing, code review and static and dynamic code testing to identify and solve vulnerabilities.
Engineers, implements, and monitors security measures for the protection of SaaS systems, networks, and information.
Identifies and defines system security requirements and designs SaaS security architecture.
Prepares and documents standard InfoSec operating procedures and protocols.
Configures and troubleshoots security infrastructure devices.
Responds as quickly as possible to security incidents and participates in the security incident response team.
Participates in security reviews as needed to facilitate technical discovery.
Participates in an on-call rotation.
Other duties as assigned.
requirements: 3+ years of experience as a DevOps Engineer.
2+ years of experience using AWS.
Infrastructure as code experience (CloudFormation or Terraform).
Configuration as code experience, preferably with Ansible.
Strong Bash or PowerShell scripting experience, programming in Python, .NET, Node, or TypeScript.
Experience building CI/CD pipelines.
Experience with Docker.
Familiarity and practical experience with System Security Engineering or Information Security Engineering.
Experience with network security and networking technologies and with system, security, and network monitoring tools.

text.overview: We're seeking a Senior SecOps Engineer to architect, build, and manage the security posture and infrastructure that powers Eleven's SaaS platform. This is a high-ownership role ideal for a hands-on engineer with deep AWS security knowledge, strong automation skills, and a security-first mindset. You'll lead security initiatives, automate secure deployments, improve system observability, and guide teams toward robust, secure, and scalable solutions. You will also bring expertise in security automation, CI/CD pipeline security, secure networking, and incident response.
essentialFunctions: Designs and maintains a highly secure and scalable AWS-based infrastructure using security services like AWS WAF, IAM, and Inspector alongside services such as EC2, ECS, S3, and VPC.
Automates security provisioning, secure CI/CD pipelines, and system observability.
Proactively manages and improves security Key Lifecycle Objectives (KLOs) such as vulnerability scanning and certificate management.
Leads the development and implementation of security best practices, including threat modeling and incident response.
Owns and delivers mid-sized security projects (e.g., IAM role refactoring, multi-region security rollout, new environment security hardening).
Documents security standards, decisions, and automation workflows in a clear, shareable format.
Participates in incident response, root cause analysis, and on-call rotation.
Mentors teammates and supports cross-functional security needs.
requirements: 10+ years in SecOps, DevOps, and/or security engineering roles with heavy AWS usage, including at least 5 years in SecOps.
Familiarity with incident response workflows, root cause analysis, and operational runbooks.
Deep experience with AWS security services: IAM, WAF, Config, Inspector, Security Hub, and KMS, as well as general services like EC2, ECS/Fargate, DynamoDB, and VPC.
Strong Infrastructure as Code skills, with a focus on security policies and controls.
Expertise in CI/CD pipeline security, including static and dynamic analysis tools.
Solid understanding of cloud networking, IAM policies, encryption (KMS), and secrets management.
Experience with compliance efforts (SOC 2, PCI) via logging, identity boundaries, and change management.
Experience with log analysis and observability platforms (e.g., Datadog, Sumo Logic, CloudWatch).
preferred: Hands-on experience maintaining SQL-based data stores, including monitoring health, ensuring compliance, and supporting backup/recovery and lifecycle policies.
Strong scripting (Bash, Python) and automation fluency.
Serverless security using Lambda, SQS, and SNS.
Experience with enterprise WiFi authentication and captive portal management.

text.overview: As the IT Security & Infrastructure Manager, you will be responsible for designing, implementing and managing the security framework and IT infrastructure that supports our business operations. You will play a key role in protecting Eleven Software's digital assets, ensuring compliance with industry regulations, and optimizing our infrastructure for scalability and performance.
essentialFunctions: Develops and enforces security policies, procedures, and best practices to protect company data and infrastructure.
Manages and monitors network security, firewalls, endpoint protection, and cloud security measures.
Oversees IT infrastructure, ensuring high availability, performance, and resilience across cloud and on-premise environments.
Conducts risk assessments and vulnerability testing to identify and mitigate potential security threats.
Implements and manages security compliance frameworks (e.g., ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, CCPA, PCI-DSS).
Responds to and manages security incidents, including investigation, mitigation, and reporting.
Collaborates with engineering, DevOps, and product teams to integrate security best practices into the software development lifecycle.
Leads IT projects related to infrastructure upgrades, security enhancements, and disaster recovery planning.
Develops and manages IT infrastructure budgets, monitoring and optimizing operational costs.
Works with external vendors and partners to evaluate and implement security solutions.
Oversees onboarding and offboarding of staff and contractors, including computers and software applications.
Oversees IT Helpdesk activities to ensure timely response and resolution of requests.
Responds to security and privacy inquiries from customers and potential customers in support of the sales team.
requirements: 7+ years of experience in IT security, infrastructure, DevOps, management, or related fields.
Strong knowledge of cloud security (AWS preferred) and network security.
Experience with security frameworks such as NIST, ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, and CIS benchmarks.
Proficiency in managing firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPNs, and endpoint security solutions.
Hands-on experience with infrastructure automation tools (Terraform, Ansible) and monitoring systems.
Familiarity with compliance and regulatory requirements in SaaS environments.
preferred: Relevant certifications (CISSP, CISM, CEH, AWS Security Specialty).

text.overview: We are seeking a highly skilled and analytical Senior Quality Assurance Engineer to lead quality assurance efforts for Eleven's core software applications, designing and executing automated and manual testing strategies that validate end-to-end functionality, high-throughput network authentication, API integrations, and data pipeline integrity. This is a technical, infrastructure-aware role rather than traditional black-box testing, requiring comfort querying complex relational databases and leveraging AI tools to accelerate test coverage. This role reports to the CTO and has no direct reports.
essentialFunctions: Designs, implements, and maintains advanced test automation frameworks for backend systems, network integrations, and multi-layered web applications.
Leads end-to-end testing of RESTful APIs, third-party API integrations, and secure network communication workflows.
Ensures cloud architectures deployed on AWS run flawlessly by testing deployments using EC2, Lambda, S3, and DynamoDB, with strict adherence to IAM policies and security groups.
Formulates and executes T-SQL scripts to validate relational database schemas and data mutations, and manages and tests search/indexing layers built on OpenSearch.
Incorporates generative AI technologies into the testing workflow to auto-generate mock data, synthesize edge-case scenarios, and optimize test script writing.
Identifies, documents, isolates, and tracks bugs through Jira/Azure DevOps, providing deep technical insights (logs, network traces, stack traces) to accelerate developer remediation.
requirements: 8+ years of professional software QA engineering experience, with a heavy emphasis on test automation and backend validation.
Strong proficiency in C# and the .NET ecosystem, alongside experience writing, testing, and debugging PHP backend code.
Hands-on experience testing workloads on core AWS architecture, including EC2, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, and IAM.
High proficiency with relational database systems using T-SQL, and validating index structures inside OpenSearch/Elasticsearch.
Advanced mastery of RESTful API contracts, using tools like Postman, SoapUI, or automated HTTP clients.
preferred: Active experience utilizing AI technologies (e.g., GitHub Copilot, OpenAI API integrations) to speed up test execution or build intelligent mock services.
Proven track record of baking automated suites directly into CI/CD pipelines.
Certified AWS Solutions Architect, Developer, or SysOps, or a network engineering equivalent (CCNA, MTCNA).
Bachelor's degree in related field.

text.overview: The Customer Success Manager (CSM) is responsible for building and nurturing strong, long-term relationships with Eleven Software's customers and partners. This role is central to driving customer satisfaction, retention, and account growth. The CSM proactively manages customer health, identifies expansion opportunities, and mitigates churn within a SaaS and network-focused environment. Success in this role requires strong technical acumen, excellent communication skills, and the ability to partner closely with internal teams to ensure customers fully realize the value of ElevenOS. This role reports directly to the Director of Customer Success.
essentialFunctions: Serves as the primary point of contact for a portfolio of customers throughout the entire lifecycle, ensuring a seamless and positive experience.

requirements: Strong technical aptitude with experience in networking concepts, Wi-Fi infrastructure, topology, or IT environments.

Exceptional communication skills, capable of presenting technical information to both technical and non-technical audiences.

High attention to detail with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

text.overview: The VP of Human Resources is a senior leader who builds HR strategy and processes to ensure that the company can attract and retain a talented workforce, cultivate an environment of innovation to drive realization of our strategic objectives, and enable an exceptional employee experience. The successful candidate will be a key advisor to executive leadership and must also be able to roll up their sleeves as a hands-on human resources leader for our multinational employee base. Recognizing that culture fuels a company's success, this role seeks ways to highlight the company's values in initiatives and communications, connecting the work performed to our organizational identity.
essentialFunctions: Builds and owns the HR strategy and manages its execution, aligning HR policies, programs, and company culture to the vision and strategic objectives of the company.
Partners closely with the Leadership Team to develop and execute cohesive strategies for staffing, recruiting, retention, and development of human capital.
Maintains an effective level of business literacy including company goals, values, financial position, strategy, competition, technology, and culture.
Provides inspired leadership for the organization, leading change management and communication when appropriate.
Anticipates HR-related needs and delivers value-added services for the benefit of employees.
Provides insightful crisis management advice and coordination when required.
Manages all traditional HR functions within the organization, including day-to-day operational issues.
Educates and guides employees on HR policies, processes, and procedures; effectively resolves employee relations issues with care and respect.
Stays current with labor laws and regulations to ensure company compliance across all operating countries and states.
Ensures proper administration of benefits offerings, enrollment, and leave.
Manages and administers support for all HR technology systems.
Plays a key role in cultivating company culture, ensuring a cohesive experience across a multinational employee base.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field required; Master's degree preferred.
SPHR or SHRM-SCP preferred.
At least 10 years of human resource experience and at least 4 years of people management experience.
Proven experience managing through organizational change or growth.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Excellent interpersonal and negotiation skills.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Experience navigating the continuously evolving compliance landscape in a multi-state, multi-country organization.

text.overview: The Senior Implementation Manager leads the successful deployment of Eleven Software's solutions for the company's largest and most complex customer accounts, owning the technical and relational aspects of implementation from kickoff through go-live.
essentialFunctions: Leads the planning, coordination, and execution of large-scale, complex implementation projects.
Serves as the primary point of contact for customers throughout the implementation lifecycle.
Tracks project milestones, risks, and status, providing regular updates to customers and internal stakeholders.
Partners cross-functionally with Sales, Customer Success, and Engineering to ensure a seamless implementation experience.
Mentors and supports junior implementation team members.
Identifies opportunities to improve implementation processes and drive efficiencies.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in project management or implementation roles, ideally in a technical or SaaS environment.
Proven ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously.
Strong understanding of networking or SaaS deployment concepts.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
preferred: Experience in the hospitality or MDU verticals.

roles.title: Solutions Engineer
roles.scope: Technical IC within implementation; supports complex deployments requiring deep product/systems knowledge; may specialize in hospitality, MDU, or other verticals as team scales
roles.complexity: Handles technically complex implementations; bridges product and field deployment challenges
roles.autonomy: Self-directed on technical workstreams; partners closely with Implementation Managers
roles.influence: Technical collaborator; elevates team capability; customer-facing on technical topics

roles.title: Sr. Solutions Engineer
roles.scope: Leads technical implementation work for most complex accounts; develops technical standards and documentation; may own a vertical specialization (e.g. hospitality, MDU)
roles.complexity: Navigates the most technically demanding deployments; contributes to scalable technical frameworks
roles.autonomy: Highly autonomous; sets technical direction for their workstream; minimal supervision
roles.influence: Mentors Solutions Engineers; shapes technical practices for implementation function
roles.next: Principal Solutions Engineer or Staff Solutions Engineer

text.overview: As a Senior Solutions Engineer at Eleven, you will serve as the technical authority on the Implementation team, partnering directly with Implementation Managers and cross-functional stakeholders to design, validate, and deliver network and software deployments for Eleven's enterprise customers. This role owns the technical layer of every deployment, from solution design and architecture through configuration, validation, and handoff, ensuring that what is getting deployed is reliable, scalable, and right the first time.
essentialFunctions: Leads technical discovery for each assigned deployment project: understand the customer's existing network environment, infrastructure constraints, property topology, integration requirements, and other key technical factors that impact deployments.
Owns the technical design for every assigned deployment project, producing necessary technical documentation to enable quality deployments at scale.
Owns or oversees the configuration of network hardware and software components in accordance with the approved design.
Achieves 95% or greater accuracy at go-live, with limited rework from technical errors post-deployment.
Designs and documents the deployment architecture for each customer portfolio (e.g., network configuration, VLAN structure, SSID design, etc.).
Identifies and flags technical risks early, proposing mitigation approaches before they become deployment bottlenecks.
Leads technical troubleshooting during deployment, resolving issues definitively and ensuring solutions are scalable, with no ad-hoc workarounds.
Defines and executes validation protocols, including pre-go-live testing, acceptance criteria, and sign-off procedures.
Establishes credibility with the customer's IT/network team on each assigned account, becoming the trusted technical counterpart for all deployment-related questions.
Produces clean, structured technical handoff documentation for every go-live that enables Customer Success and Support to operate confidently without re-engaging Implementation.
requirements: 8+ years of hands-on experience in network engineering, implementation engineering, solution engineering, or a closely related technical field.
Demonstrated experience deploying or implementing enterprise networking solutions in customer environments, not just internal infrastructure.
Deep working knowledge of enterprise Wi-Fi technologies: controller-based architectures, RADIUS, 802.1X, VLANs, SSIDs, and captive portal systems.
Experience producing technical design and deployment architecture documentation, configuration guides, and validation protocols as standard work outputs.
Track record of managing multiple concurrent deployments or customer engagements with consistent technical quality.
preferred: Experience with network deployment environments across hospitality, multifamily dwellings, Managed Service Providers (MSP), or telecommunications.
Background with Property Management System (PMS) integrations.
Experience contributing to or building technical playbooks and implementation standards.

roles.complexity: Operates across implementation and technical domains; manages external partners and contractors with diverse deployment environments
roles.autonomy: Self-directed; manages partner ecosystem independently; escalates to VP on strategic partner issues
roles.influence: Cross-functional; bridges Sales, Training, and Implementation; external-facing with partner network

roles.complexity: Handles org-wide technical challenges; influences product roadmap; cross-functional technical authority

roles.influence: Org-wide technical influence; elevates entire implementation function's technical capability

roles.autonomy: Highly autonomous; sets direction for implementation sub-function; escalates to VP on budget and executive decisions
roles.influence: Manages across two potential verticals (delivery + technical); shapes hiring and org design; VP-level partner

roles.autonomy: Full executive autonomy; reports to CEO
roles.influence: C-suite partner; shapes Sales→Implementation→CS operating model; owns partner and technical strategy

text.overview: The Vice President of Implementation is responsible for the strategy and execution of Eleven Software's implementation function, ensuring customers are onboarded and deployed successfully and efficiently across all regions and account types.
essentialFunctions: Sets strategy and operational standards for the implementation organization.
Leads and develops a team of implementation managers and technical implementation staff.
Owns implementation timelines, quality standards, and customer satisfaction targets.
Partners with Sales, Customer Success, and Engineering leadership to ensure a seamless customer journey from sale through go-live.
Builds scalable implementation processes, playbooks, and tooling to support company growth.
Represents the implementation function to executive leadership and key customers.
requirements: 8+ years of experience in implementation, professional services, or project management leadership roles.
Proven track record of scaling implementation or deployment organizations.
Strong understanding of networking, SaaS deployment, or related technical domains.
Excellent leadership and executive communication skills.
preferred: Experience in hospitality, MDU, or related managed Wi-Fi verticals.

text.overview: The Accounting Clerk supports Eleven Software's finance and accounting operations by processing transactions, maintaining accurate records, and assisting with day-to-day accounting tasks including accounts receivable and accounts payable.
essentialFunctions: Processes accounts payable and accounts receivable transactions accurately and on time.
Reconciles invoices, receipts, and vendor statements.
Assists with month-end close activities, including data entry and account reconciliations.
Maintains organized financial records and supporting documentation.
Responds to internal and external inquiries regarding invoices, payments, and account balances.
Supports the accounting team with ad hoc reporting and administrative tasks.
requirements: 1+ years of experience in an accounting or bookkeeping role.
Working knowledge of accounting principles and basic bookkeeping practices.
Proficiency with accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

roles.title: Staff Accountant
roles.scope: Performs full-cycle accounting tasks including journal entries, reconciliations, and month-end close support; maintains GL accuracy and assists with AP/AR; works with moderate supervision and growing independence

roles.autonomy: Works with moderate supervision; independently manages routine accounting tasks; escalates complex or judgment-heavy issues to senior staff or manager
roles.influence: Primarily supports the accounting team; limited cross-functional interaction; provides GL and reconciliation data to peers and manager

roles.title: Financial Analyst
roles.scope: Supports financial reporting, general ledger accuracy, and month-end close activities; assists with budgeting, forecasting, and variance analysis; works within defined accounting and analytical frameworks
roles.complexity: Moderate complexity; works across multiple data sources, accounting entries, and reporting scenarios; some ambiguity in analysis and reconciliations
roles.autonomy: Works independently on defined assignments; escalates judgment calls, accounting questions, and ambiguous situations to manager
roles.influence: Collaborates cross-functionally with budget owners and operations; supports data requests and account reconciliations for leadership

text.overview: The Financial Analyst, Systems & Operations supports Eleven Software's finance function by analyzing financial data, maintaining financial systems, and delivering insights that inform business decisions across the organization.
essentialFunctions: Builds and maintains financial models, reports, and dashboards to support business decision-making.
Analyzes financial performance against budget and forecast, identifying trends and variances.
Supports the annual budgeting and periodic forecasting processes.
Maintains and improves financial systems, ensuring data accuracy and process efficiency.
Partners with cross-functional teams to gather data and provide financial analysis for key initiatives.
Prepares ad hoc analyses and reporting for finance and executive leadership.
requirements: 2+ years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, or a related role.
Strong Excel and financial modeling skills.
Experience with financial systems and reporting tools.
Excellent analytical and communication skills.
preferred: Experience with SaaS or subscription-based business models.

roles.title: Sr. Financial Analyst
roles.scope: Leads complex financial analyses and owns recurring reporting cycles; manages month-end close entries and account reconciliations; drives process improvement, automation, and forecast modeling initiatives
roles.complexity: Higher complexity; owns end-to-end reporting and close cycles; navigates cross-functional data, accounting gaps, and multi-scenario planning
roles.autonomy: Largely self-directed; manages own workstreams across accounting and FP&A deliverables; escalates on high-stakes or cross-functional decisions
roles.influence: Mentors junior analysts and accountants; influences reporting standards, close processes, and financial planning improvements

roles.title: Accounting Supervisor / Manager
roles.scope: Manages accounting operations for one or more functions (AP, AR, payroll, or close) while overseeing budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning cycles; supervises junior staff and owns accuracy of financial records and reports
roles.complexity: Manages competing priorities across accounting operations and FP&A deliverables; balances close accuracy, forecast quality, and team oversight simultaneously
roles.autonomy: Self-directed on both operational accounting and financial planning; coordinates with leadership on policy, forecasting assumptions, and staffing decisions
roles.influence: Manages and develops junior accounting and finance staff; cross-functional partner for department budget owners and business planning

text.overview: The Accounting Supervisor/Manager oversees day-to-day accounting operations at Eleven Software, ensuring accurate and timely financial record-keeping while supervising accounting staff and supporting month-end and year-end close processes.
essentialFunctions: Supervises accounting staff responsible for accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger activities.
Oversees month-end and year-end close processes, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.
Reviews and approves journal entries, reconciliations, and financial reports.
Ensures compliance with accounting policies, procedures, and internal controls.
Partners with the Controller and Finance leadership on process improvements and audit preparation.
Mentors and develops accounting team members.
requirements: 4+ years of accounting experience, including supervisory experience.
Strong knowledge of GAAP and accounting principles.
Experience with month-end close processes and financial reporting.
Excellent leadership and organizational skills.
preferred: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

roles.title: Controller
roles.scope: Oversees all accounting operations and financial close; owns internal controls, compliance, and audit readiness; partners with leadership on financial reporting and planning
roles.complexity: High complexity; manages month-end close, audit, and compliance simultaneously; navigates regulatory and operational demands
roles.autonomy: Highly autonomous; owns accounting operations end-to-end; escalates to Sr. Controller/VP on strategic matters
roles.influence: Org-wide influence on financial controls and reporting standards; key partner to leadership team

text.overview: The Controller oversees Eleven Software's accounting operations, ensuring accurate financial reporting, strong internal controls, and compliance with accounting standards, while partnering closely with Finance leadership on strategic financial matters.
essentialFunctions: Oversees all accounting operations, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, general ledger, and payroll.
Ensures accurate and timely monthly, quarterly, and annual financial close and reporting.
Establishes and maintains strong internal controls and accounting policies.
Leads external audit processes and manages relationships with auditors.
Partners with the VP of Finance on budgeting, forecasting, and financial strategy.
Manages and develops the accounting team.
requirements: 7+ years of progressive accounting experience, including leadership roles.
Strong knowledge of GAAP, financial reporting, and internal controls.
Experience managing external audits and accounting teams.
Excellent leadership, analytical, and communication skills.
preferred: CPA certification.
text.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (CPA preferred).

roles.title: Sr. Controller
roles.scope: Leads advanced accounting and financial strategy; drives audit readiness and complex technical accounting decisions; right hand to VP
roles.complexity: Very high complexity; resolves technical accounting issues, drives audit prep, and supports strategic financial decisions
roles.autonomy: Operates with minimal oversight; independently drives complex accounting and reporting; partners closely with VP
roles.influence: High influence; shapes accounting policy and financial reporting across the org; trusted advisor to VP

roles.title: VP of Finance
roles.scope: Owns the full finance function; partners with COO/CEO and board on financial strategy, fundraising, and long-range planning; accountable for all financial reporting and compliance
roles.complexity: Full-function complexity; manages financial strategy, fundraising, investor relations, and operational finance concurrently
roles.autonomy: Full executive autonomy over finance function; reports to COO/CEO; self-directed on strategy and execution
roles.influence: Company-wide influence; partners with COO/CEO, board, and investors; shapes financial culture and strategy

text.overview: The VP of Finance leads Eleven Software's finance function, overseeing financial planning, reporting, and strategy while serving as a key business partner to executive leadership on the company's financial health and growth.
essentialFunctions: Leads financial planning and analysis, budgeting, and forecasting processes for the company.
Oversees accounting operations, financial reporting, and compliance.
Partners with the CEO and executive leadership on financial strategy and key business decisions.
Manages relationships with external auditors, banks, and financial partners.
Builds and develops the finance and accounting team.
Presents financial results and analysis to the leadership team and board as needed.
requirements: 10+ years of progressive finance experience, including leadership roles.
Strong knowledge of financial planning, accounting, and reporting for a growing company.
Proven experience partnering with executive leadership on strategic financial decisions.
Excellent leadership, analytical, and communication skills.
preferred: Experience in SaaS or subscription-based business models.
text.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field (MBA or CPA a plus).

roles.title: CFO
roles.scope: Top executive; sets company-wide financial vision and strategy; accountable to board and investors; drives capital allocation, M&A, and financial risk management
roles.complexity: Enterprise-level complexity; navigates board, investor, regulatory, and strategic financial demands simultaneously
roles.autonomy: Full board-level autonomy; sets financial direction independently; accountable to COO/CEO and board
roles.influence: Board-level influence; sets financial vision for entire organization; external-facing with investors and stakeholders

text.overview: The Chief Financial Officer is a key member of Eleven Software's executive leadership team, responsible for the company's overall financial strategy, health, and operations, partnering closely with the CEO and board on long-term growth and strategic decisions.
essentialFunctions: Sets the company's overall financial strategy, including capital structure, budgeting, and long-term planning.
Oversees all finance and accounting operations, ensuring accurate reporting and strong internal controls.
Serves as a key strategic partner to the CEO and board of directors on financial matters.
Leads fundraising, financing, and investor relations activities as needed.
Builds and leads a high-performing finance organization.
Ensures compliance with financial regulations and reporting requirements.
requirements: 12+ years of progressive finance leadership experience, including executive-level roles.
Proven track record of leading finance functions at a growing company.
Strong strategic, analytical, and leadership skills.
Experience partnering with boards, investors, and executive leadership.
preferred: Experience in SaaS or subscription-based business models.
text.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field (MBA or CPA preferred).

roles.title: President and Chief Operating Officer
roles.scope: Oversees all aspects of company operations, strategy, financial performance, and resource allocation across the organization.
roles.complexity: Balances strategic vision with day-to-day operational execution across every department; navigates company-wide financial and organizational decisions.
roles.autonomy: Full executive autonomy over company operations; partners closely with the CEO and Board on strategy.
roles.influence: Company-wide authority over operations and resource allocation; represents Eleven with clients, partners, investors, and the Board.

text.overview: The President/COO of Eleven Software oversees all aspects of operations, strategy, financial performance, and resource allocation. The President collaborates closely with the Board of Directors and the executive team to set and execute the company's strategy and vision, ensuring a competitive edge and sustained profitability.
essentialFunctions: Develops and communicates a clear strategic vision and mission for the company.
Collaborates with the executive team to formulate and execute strategic plans that drive growth and profitability.
Monitors industry trends, competition, and market dynamics to identify opportunities and threats.
Oversees the financial health of the company, including budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting.
Makes data-driven decisions to optimize revenue, reduce costs, and maximize profitability.
Leads fundraising efforts if required, including securing investment capital or debt financing.
Ensures efficient and effective day-to-day operations across all departments.
Implements processes and systems to improve operational efficiency, scalability, and customer satisfaction.
Fosters a culture of continuous improvement and innovation.
Allocates and manages resources effectively, including personnel, technology, and capital.
Hires, develops, and retains top talent across the organization.
Establishes and monitors performance metrics to drive accountability and results.
Builds and maintains strong relationships with clients, partners, investors, and the Board of Directors.
Represents the company at industry events, conferences, and with the media.

roles.title: Chief Executive Officer
roles.scope: Provides strategic leadership and direction for the company, working closely with the Board and Leadership Team to establish long- and short-term goals, strategies, and plans.
roles.complexity: Navigates the full range of strategic, financial, operational, and cultural challenges facing the company at the highest level.
roles.autonomy: Full executive autonomy; reports to the Board of Directors and leads the senior Leadership Team.
roles.influence: Sets company-wide vision and culture; represents Eleven externally to customers, partners, investors, and the industry at large.

text.overview: This role is responsible for providing strategic leadership and direction for the company by working closely with the Board and the Leadership Team to establish long and short-term goals, strategies and plans. This position reports to the Board of Directors and is responsible for hiring and managing the senior Leadership Team, which spans Marketing, Customer Success & Information Security, Human Resources, and Sales.
essentialFunctions: Grows the company as a leader in guest Wi-Fi management software.
Develops short- and long-term strategies to achieve targeted growth and revenue goals.
Continues to improve the company culture to better reflect Eleven's core values of service and customer care.
Actively participates in the sales process, aiding the sales team in growing initial relationships, lead generation, strengthening partnerships, and closing key deals.
Positions Eleven as a leader in the software space by attending key trade events, vendor conferences, and serving as a global thought leader.
Evaluates the impact of long-range planning and the introduction of new strategies and actions.
Provides accurate analysis of budgets, financial reports, and business trends to assist the Board in performing their responsibilities.
Enhances, develops, implements, and enforces policies and procedures to improve the overall operation and effectiveness of the company.
Establishes credibility throughout the organization and with the Board as an effective developer of solutions to business challenges.
Builds and leads an effective and cohesive management team; recruits personnel and ensures appropriate salary structures are developed and maintained.
Ensures company objectives and standards of performance are understood and owned by management and employees.
requirements: Advanced degree, MBA preferred.
10+ years of senior management experience preferred.
Track record of effectively leading and scaling a performance-based organization in the software industry preferred.
Ability to operationalize strategies that have led a software organization to the next stage of growth.
Extensive experience in fundraising.
